body.purpose: Form labels, descriptions, basket item metadata, modal body text.

label.purpose: Metadata chips, capacity status, sync counters, browse mode filter text, folder type badges.

title.purpose: Card title text, panel sub-headers, component group labels.

headline.purpose: Library view h1, basket sidebar heading, dialog titles.

shadows.name: card-hover
shadows.purpose: Media card hover lift. Applied only on :hover, never at rest.

shadows.name: card-rest
shadows.purpose: Media card at rest (ambient depth). Subtle — mostly serves as anti-aliasing against the dark background.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default for state transitions (hover, border-color, opacity). 0.15–0.2s duration.

motion.name: card-hover-lift
motion.purpose: Media card hover: translateY(-2px) + shadow in. Matches the product register's 150–200ms window.

motion.name: fade-in-up
motion.purpose: Sync proposed banner entrance: fadeIn keyframe from opacity 0 + translateY(-4px).

breakpoints.name: compact
breakpoints.purpose: Library header collapses from row to column; server chip goes full width.

breakpoints.name: narrow
breakpoints.purpose: Padding reduction on library view; media grid min card width decreases.

breakpoints.name: mobile
breakpoints.purpose: Media grid min card width drops to 140px.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main action trigger. Signal Cyan background, void text. Used for Connect, Sync now, Save changes.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #22b8f0; color: #0b1020; padding: 0 1rem; height: 2.5rem; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; border: none; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; transition: filter 0.15s ease, transform 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { filter: brightness(1.1); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #22b8f0; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary actions and filter chips. Transparent background, subtle border.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #f1f5f9; padding: 0 1rem; height: 2.5rem; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.18); border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease, border-color 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.28); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #22b8f0; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-ghost:disabled { opacity: 0.35; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Media Card
components.description: Primary library browsing unit. Album art top, title + subtitle below. Hover lifts; selection applies a cyan ring.
components.html: Kind of BlueMiles Davis · 1959
components.css: .ds-media-card { background: #24252b; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.10); border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.18s ease, box-shadow 0.18s ease, border-color 0.18s ease; overflow: hidden; width: 190px; } .ds-media-card:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 10px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.28); border-color: rgba(34,184,240,0.35); } .ds-media-card-image { width: 100%; aspect-ratio: 1/1; background: #1a2540; } .ds-media-card-body { padding: 0.65rem 0.75rem 0.7rem; } .ds-media-card-title { display: block; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 600; color: #f1f5f9; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; } .ds-media-card-sub { display: block; font-size: 0.8rem; color: #b0bac6; margin-top: 0.1rem; }

components.name: Basket Item
components.description: Item row in the sync basket sidebar. Thumbnail left, title and meta center, remove action right.
components.html: Kind of BlueAlbum · 1 item
components.css: .ds-basket-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.75rem; padding: 0.5rem; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.045); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.075); border-radius: 8px; transition: background 0.2s ease, border-color 0.2s ease; } .ds-basket-item:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.07); border-color: rgba(34,184,240,0.26); } .ds-basket-thumb { width: 48px; height: 48px; background: #1a2540; border-radius: 4px; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-basket-info { flex: 1; overflow: hidden; } .ds-basket-name { display: block; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 500; color: #f1f5f9; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; } .ds-basket-meta { display: block; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #b0bac6; }

components.name: Capacity Bar
components.description: Storage visualization in the basket sidebar. A segmented 8px bar: used (white), pending selection (cyan), free (transparent).
components.html: 14.2 GB free of 32 GB
components.css: .ds-capacity { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.4rem; } .ds-capacity-bar { display: flex; height: 8px; border-radius: 4px; overflow: hidden; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); } .ds-cap-used { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.25); transition: width 0.3s ease; } .ds-cap-pending { background: #22b8f0; opacity: 0.7; transition: width 0.3s ease; } .ds-cap-free { background: transparent; } .ds-capacity-label { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8rem; color: #b0bac6; }

components.name: Server Connection Chip
components.description: Compact server status indicator in the library header. URL + server type badge, truncated. Indicates the active connection.
components.html: http://nas.local:8096Jellyfin
components.css: .ds-server-chip { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.35rem 0.45rem 0.35rem 0.6rem; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12); border-radius: 4px; background: rgba(10,16,30,0.62); font-size: 0.78rem; color: #b0bac6; max-width: 380px; } .ds-server-chip-url { flex: 1; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-server-chip-badge { flex-shrink: 0; background: rgba(34,184,240,0.18); color: #22b8f0; border: 1px solid rgba(34,184,240,0.35); border-radius: 4px; padding: 0.1rem 0.4rem; font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 600; }

components.name: Warning Banner
components.description: Inline warning strip for real problems: dirty manifest, sync warnings. Amber only; never decorative.
components.html: Manifest out of sync3 files on device are not tracked.
components.css: .ds-warn-banner { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; background: rgba(235,179,52,0.12); border: 1px solid rgba(235,179,52,0.3); border-radius: 4px; color: #EBB334; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s ease; } .ds-warn-banner:hover { background: rgba(235,179,52,0.2); } .ds-warn-body { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.1rem; font-size: 0.8rem; } .ds-warn-body strong { font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 600; } .ds-warn-body span { opacity: 0.85; }

narrative.overview:
HifiMule is the quiet room where a serious listener manages their collection. The interface is dark by necessity and conviction: audiophiles work at their desk with a device in hand, focused. There are no recommendations, no discovery nudges, no promotional surfaces. The UI holds the library the way a crate holds records: organized, accessible, non-intrusive.

The visual language is deep navy and silence. A very dark blue-tinted void (#0b1020) recedes behind layered panel surfaces. The only color that speaks is Signal Cyan (#22b8f0): one live wire in an otherwise dark board, used exclusively on primary actions, active states, and real-time indicators.

The system explicitly rejects the iTunes paradigm: no glossy gradients, no cover-flow showmanship, no paternalistic smart features. It also rejects the streaming-app aesthetic — no discovery carousels, no algorithmic surfaces.
keyCharacteristics: Deep dark void with a cold blue tint — not generic dark mode, but a specific nautical-instrument depth
Single accent color (Signal Cyan) used only on actionable and live-state elements
Shoelace web components for consistent interactive primitives
Tonal depth through transparency stacking over the gradient base rather than hard shadows
Inter at fixed sizes: legibility over expression
Density-comfortable: primary view is a full media grid with a persistent basket sidebar

rules.name: The One Wire Rule
rules.body: Signal Cyan appears on ≤10% of any given screen. Only active and actionable elements carry it. Decorative use is prohibited by definition.

rules.name: The Amber Threshold
rules.body: Amber (#EBB334) appears only when the user needs to act or be warned. If you are tempted to use it for visual interest, choose a neutral instead.

rules.name: The Fixed-Scale Rule
rules.body: No fluid/clamp typography. HifiMule runs as a desktop Tauri app at consistent DPI. All sizes are fixed rem.

rules.name: The No-Display Rule
rules.body: Inter is body and label. Do not introduce a display or serif family.

rules.name: The Flat-At-Rest Rule
rules.body: Shadows appear only in response to hover or selection state. A shadow on an interactive element at rest reads as noise, not depth.

rules.name: The Blur-Is-Structural Rule
rules.body: backdrop-filter: blur() is used only on sticky/pinned layers that need to separate from content scrolling beneath them. Never on cards, list items, or anything rendered mid-scroll.

dos: Do use Signal Cyan exclusively for actionable and live-state elements.
Do convey depth through background color steps (Void → Panel → Surface), not shadow stacks.
Do use Amber (#EBB334) only for warnings that require user attention.
Do keep type at fixed rem sizes.
Do maintain WCAG 2.1 AA contrast (≥4.5:1 for body text).
Do use backdrop-filter: blur() only on sticky/pinned layers.
Do use Shoelace's native button states. Do not override the focus ring.
Do show hover lift on media cards as a state signal, not a structural treatment.
donts: Don't build a glassmorphism card system.
Don't import the iTunes paradigm: no cover-flow, no smart auto-curated sections, no gradient hero.
Don't use streaming-app aesthetics: no discovery carousels, no recommendation surfaces.
Don't use SaaS dashboard patterns: no hero-metric cards.
Don't use uppercase for body copy or titles.
Don't introduce a new accent color without removing one.
